title: hieracium substellatum subsp. tordanum
intro: Hieracium substellatum subsp. tordanum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium substellatum subsp. tordanum are believed to contribute to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to be used for medicinal purposes.
